description: Example role-to-budget-tier mapping for assigning LiteLLM budget tiers to known Open WebUI users (recorded as LiteLLM customers). This is a later governance step and is NOT required for usage tracking, which happens automatically as Open WebUI forwards the user identity per request.

identity.note: Open WebUI forwards this value as x-litellm-customer-id via its global user-info header-forwarding env vars. The UUID is the Open WebUI user id and is the governance-grade default; email mode is only for readable names in the LiteLLM UI during rollout, at the cost of email-in-logs. Only one mode is active at a time.
